issues.title: Phase 6: MCP server and docker-deployable LLM interface for MarketLab
issues.body:
## Summary
Add a standard Model Context Protocol server so an LLM can use MarketLab through a Docker sidecar and a generic stdio bridge.

## Scope
- standard MCP stdio server
- sandboxed workspace, artifact, and optional read-only repo mounts
- config authoring, queued job control, and artifact inspection tools
- Docker deployment docs and required CI coverage

## Non-goals
- no HTTP or SSE transport in v1
- no multi-user session management
- no arbitrary repo edits
- no model-binary management
- no time-series comparison surface in v1

issues.title: Add MarketLab MCP server scaffold, packaging, and workspace sandbox
issues.body:
## Scope
- add the `marketlab[mcp]` optional dependency group
- add the `marketlab-mcp` entrypoint
- bootstrap the stdio MCP server
- add workspace and artifact sandbox rules
- add read-only repo import rules
- add CLI-subprocess execution foundation
- keep one active job plus a FIFO queue per session
- add a reusable stdio MCP test harness

## Review
- critic
- qa

issues.title: Add template and full-schema config authoring tools to the MarketLab MCP server
issues.body:
## Scope
- template listing
- template export into the workspace
- repo config copy into the workspace
- structured config reads
- recursive persisted-YAML patch operations
- validation through the existing MarketLab loader

## Depends on
- Add MarketLab MCP server scaffold, packaging, and workspace sandbox

## Review
- qa

issues.title: Add async workflow execution, confirmation gates, and job logs to the MarketLab MCP server
issues.body:
## Scope
- implement `marketlab_plan_run` and `marketlab_start_job`
- queued execution for `prepare-data`, `backtest`, `train-models`, and `run-experiment`
- offline gating when cache or panel data is missing
- status inspection, log tails, and cancel behavior

## Depends on
- Add MarketLab MCP server scaffold, packaging, and workspace sandbox
- Add template and full-schema config authoring tools to the MarketLab MCP server

## Review
- financial-expert
- critic
- qa

issues.title: Add artifact inspection, plot retrieval, and run comparison tools to the MarketLab MCP server
issues.body:
## Scope
- run listing and run summaries
- artifact catalog tools
- structured CSV and Markdown readers
- plot retrieval for review images
- compact summary-table comparison across runs

## Depends on
- Add async workflow execution, confirmation gates, and job logs to the MarketLab MCP server

## Review
- qa

issues.title: Add Docker sidecar deployment docs, compose example, and required MCP CI
issues.body:
## Scope
- install `marketlab[mcp]` in the Docker image
- add a compose example for the MCP sidecar container
- document the generic `docker exec -i` bridge
- verify the installed `marketlab-mcp` entrypoint in package smoke
- add a required Dockerized MCP CI lane

## Depends on
- Add MarketLab MCP server scaffold, packaging, and workspace sandbox

## Review
- critic
- qa
